# terrible_lowlydba_sqlserver_agent_job_step (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `job` (String) The name of the job to which to add the step.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `command` (String) The commands to be executed by SQLServerAgent service through subsystem.
- `database` (String) The name of the database in which to execute a Transact-SQL step.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `on_fail_action` (String) The action to perform if the step fails.
- `on_fail_step_id` (Number) The ID of the step in this job to execute if the step fails and *on_fail_action=GoToStep*.
- `on_success_action` (String) The action to perform if the step succeeds.
- `on_success_step_id` (Number) The ID of the step in this job to execute if the step succeeds and *on_success_action=GoToStep*.
- `output_file` (String) The full path to the output file for the job step. This specifies where the output of the job step will be written.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `retry_attempts` (Number) The number of retry attempts to use if this step fails. The default is `0`.
- `retry_interval` (Number) The amount of time in minutes between retry attempts.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `step_id` (Number) The sequence identification number for the job step. Step identification numbers start at `1` and increment without gaps. Required if *state=present*.
- `step_name` (String) The name of the step. Required if *state=present*.
- `subsystem` (String) The subsystem used by the SQL Server Agent service to execute command.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `data` (String) Output from the `New-DbaAgentJobStep`, `Set-DbaAgentJobStep`, or `Remove-DbaAgentJobStep` function.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
